name: Trust Accounting Monthly
description: Accounting coordinates month-end trust reconciliation with approval gates before any money movement or ledger correction.

stages.name: Collect Statements
stages.description: Gather bank, book, and liability source data.

steps.title: Collect bank, book, and liability balances
steps.instructions: Collect month-end bank statement, book ledger, and liability ledger balances. Do not adjust ledgers.
steps.dispatch_body: Collect bank, book, and liability balances for month-end trust reconciliation. No ledger corrections.

steps.title: Review source data completeness
steps.instructions: Confirm source data is complete before reconciliation begins.
steps.human_prompt: Confirm trust reconciliation source data is complete.

stages.name: Three-Way Reconciliation
stages.description: Compare bank equals book equals liability and explain variances.

steps.title: Run three-way reconciliation
steps.instructions: Compare bank, book, and liability balances. Produce variance explanation and exception list.
steps.dispatch_body: Run bank=book=liability reconciliation and produce variance exceptions. No money movement or ledger correction.

steps.title: Approve variance handling
steps.instructions: Approve variance handling before any correction, transfer, or owner draw.
steps.human_prompt: Approval required before any trust ledger correction or money movement.

steps.title: Draft owner statement notes
steps.instructions: Draft owner statement notes with explainable line items and approved variance handling.
steps.dispatch_body: Draft owner statement notes from approved trust reconciliation outputs.

steps.title: Archive reconciliation package
steps.instructions: Archive final statement, reconciliation report, and approval evidence.
steps.human_prompt: Archive the approved trust reconciliation package.
